hero.subtitle: Explore portfolios, check verified studios for hygiene, and chat directly with your preferred artist via WhatsApp.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search studio, city, tattoo style, or artist...
hero.bottomTagline: SAFETY & AESTHETIC STANDARDS FOR INDONESIAN TATTOOS

cta.title: Own a tattoo studio?
cta.subtitle: Showcase your portfolio on RuangTato, build your own studio page, and receive potential clients directly via WhatsApp — no middlemen.

pricing.title: Choose a Plan That Fits Your Needs
pricing.subtitle: Transparent, with no hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
pricing.headerDesc: Choose the subscription duration that fits best. No hidden fees, no vendor lock-in.
pricing.footerNote: All prices include VAT. Secure payment via Midtrans.
pricing.faqDescPrefix: Still unclear? Our team is ready to help via email

faq.a: Currently we do not provide a free trial, but all plans can be refunded within the first 7 days if there are technical issues on our end.

faq.q: What is the difference between plans?
faq.a: The Starter plan is great for studios just starting out. Growth and Pro add analytics and trusted badges. Enterprise is for studios with large teams and API needs.
Payments are securely processed via Midtrans. We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfers, e-wallets (GoPay, OVO, DANA), and QRIS.
No. You need to renew manually before the active period ends. We will send a reminder 7 days before the due date.

faq.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade midway?
faq.a: Yes. Upgrades will be active immediately with prorated calculation, while downgrades apply when the next cycle begins.

appShell.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to sign out of this account?

auth.loginDesc: Enter your email and password to continue
auth.errorSignIn: Failed to sign in. Check your email and password.
auth.errorNoEmail: Enter your email first to resend verification.
auth.successResend: Verification email has been resent. Please check your inbox.
auth.registerDesc: Create an account to get started
auth.name: Full Name
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your account email and we will send a password reset link.
auth.forgotSuccessMsg: If the email {email} is registered in our system, we have sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) in a few minutes.
auth.errorForgot: Failed to send password reset email. Please try again in a moment.
auth.resetInvalidTokenDesc: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new link.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been updated. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.resetDesc: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorResetPassword: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

footer.desc: Exclusive landing page platform for professional tattoo studios in Indonesia.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor your studio performance in real-time.
dashboard.dailyStatsDesc: Daily data will be available after advanced analytics features are released.
dashboard.dailyStatsNote: Currently, please refer to the total views, clicks, and leads summary above.
dashboard.noLeads: No leads yet. Leads from the appointment form will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your studio profile, team, and account.

profile.title: Studio Profile
profile.desc: Basic studio information displayed on the landing page
profile.coverNote: Used in the studio directory. Leave blank to automatically use the Hero image from the builder.
profile.errorMsg: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
profile.imageUploadError: An error occurred while uploading the image.

team.title: Team Members
team.desc: Manage who has access to this studio
team.inviteDesc: Send an email invitation to join this studio
team.comingSoon: Multi-user team management is coming soon. Currently, only the primary owner has access to the studio.

account.title: Account Settings
account.desc: Change your account email and password

danger.title: Delete Studio
danger.desc: Once the studio is deleted, all data including landing pages, leads, and statistics will be permanently lost. This action cannot be undone.
danger.confirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All studio data including landing pages, leads, and statistics will be deleted permanently.

billing.title: Billing & Subscriptions
billing.description: Manage your studio subscription plans and view transaction history.

currentPlan.title: Current Plan
currentPlan.noPlanDesc: You have not subscribed to any plans yet.

invoice.title: Invoice
invoice.footer: This invoice is a valid digital transaction proof. Keep this document for your administrative records. Questions? Contact {email}

checkout.restrictedDesc: Please complete your payment first to activate the Page Builder features.
checkout.registerSuccessDesc: Your studio has been registered. As a final step, activate your subscription to start designing your landing page.
checkout.activateBuilderDesc: Start building a high-converting professional landing page for your tattoo studio.
checkout.paymentSecureNote: Payments are securely processed by Midtrans
checkout.needHelp: Need help? Contact our billing support at {email}
checkout.errorGateway: Failed to load payment gateway. Please reload the page.

checkoutSuccess.loadingDesc: Checking your payment status with Midtrans...
checkoutSuccess.successDesc: Your studio subscription is now active. Welcome to Ruang Tato!
checkoutSuccess.pendingDesc: Your payment is currently being processed. We will activate your subscription as soon as payment is confirmed.
checkoutSuccess.failedDesc: Your payment could not be processed successfully. Please try again or contact support.

table.pendingNote: If you have transferred, the subscription will activate automatically in a few minutes. This page will refresh automatically.

builder.restrictedDesc: The Page Builder feature is exclusive to subscribed users. Please complete the payment to use this feature.
builder.emptyPreviewDesc: Add blocks from the left panel to start designing
builder.emptyPropertiesDesc: Select a block in the Layers panel or Canvas to edit its properties.
builder.discardDesc: All unsaved changes will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
builder.publishDesc: Your landing page will go live and be publicly accessible.
builder.toastPublishSavedError: Failed to save changes before publishing.

pendingPayment.title: Payment Awaiting Confirmation
pendingPayment.desc: The {plan} plan (order {orderId}) is awaiting confirmation from Midtrans. Your subscription will activate automatically once the payment succeeds.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

suspended.title: Studio Inactive
suspended.description: This studio page is currently inactive. Contact Ruang Tato if you are the studio owner.

notFoundStudio.title: Studio Not Found
notFoundStudio.description: The studio page you are looking for is unavailable or has not been published yet.
